label: bad
acceptable_structural_failures: The evaluator kills the thesis for conflating internal arithmetic reproducibility with proof of a broader architectural property such as anti-gaming or empirical validity.
The evaluator kills the thesis for relying on undefined or manipulable upstream inputs while claiming those inputs prove architectural validity.
The evaluator kills the thesis for providing no independent falsification environment beyond its own metric bookkeeping.
description: A thesis that claims architectural proof but only tests its own derived metric.
